headline: CNA Financial (NYSE:CNA) Misses Q1 CY2026 Revenue Estimates
summary: Insurance provider CNA Financial (NYSE:CNA) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026 as sales only rose 1.1% year on year to $3.68 billion. Its GAAP profit of $0.78 per share was 37.1% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Loews Q1 EPS $1.63 Down From $1.74 YoY, Sales $4.555B Up From $4.494B YoY
summary: Loews (NYSE:L) reported quarterly earnings of $1.63 per share. This is a 6.32 percent decrease over earnings of $1.74 per share from the same period last year.  The company reported $4.555 billion in sales this quarter.

headline: Will S&P 500 Open Up Or Down On May 4?
summary: The S&P 500 extended its rally on Friday, rising 0.29% to close at a record 7,230.12, as easing oil prices and strong earnings continued to support equities.
